headline: Storm warning: someone said 'can we just' and meant chaos.
subhead: Carry a small umbrella for emails that begin with 'hey'.
bulletins: 4:59 PM: urgent sparkle advisory (avoid eye contact).
Recommended coping mechanism: open a blank spreadsheet for comfort.
1:00 PM: meeting thunder and a front of 'makes sense.'
9:00 AM: inbox drizzle with localized calendar turbulence.

feature.name: Sigh Ledger
feature.description: All sighs must be logged. Please provide a receipt for each exhale.
